character_identity_card: PROTAGONIST IDENTITY (LOCKED CORE TRAITS — match the avatar reference image faithfully): Caucasian man, COMPLETELY BALD (shaved head, no hair), with a NEAT GROOMED DARK BEARD AND MUSTACHE (short, well-kept goatee-style covering chin and upper lip, NOT a long beard). Face: friendly cartoon style with white skin tone, simple but expressive — round black eyes WITH visible white sclera and dark pupils (NOT pure dot eyes), thin curved black eyebrows, slight cartoon smile, prominent ears. Default outfit (casual/explainer scenes): NAVY BLUE CABLE-KNIT KNITTED SWEATER over a light gray collared shirt — visible cable braid texture on the sweater body and arms is the iconic look from the avatar. Expert / formal scenes: clean SHARP DARK CORPORATE SUIT with white shirt, NO patterns, NO knit texture transferred onto the suit sleeves. Body: cartoon proportions, thick black outlines, flat colors, no shading. Role: the expert / guide / advisor explaining financial and professional concepts.
character_block: The central subject is the protagonist/expert (see identity card above — DO NOT deviate). ABSOLUTE RULE FOR OTHER HUMANS IN THE SCENE: secondary characters (like the 'patients', 'clients', or named protagonists like Ryan/Connor/Tyler/David in comparison stories) should be drawn as extremely simplified, almost faceless vector figures (e.g., pure white or plain colored silhouettes with minimal or no facial features, sometimes marked with symbols like a red cross on the chest). They act as generic stand-ins for 'the public' or 'the victims' of bad financial systems. They should contrast with the main expert character who has slightly more detail but still remains in the clean vector style. CRITICAL OUTFIT RULE FOR ALL SECONDARY CHARACTERS: they MUST wear LONG-SLEEVE plain solid-color shirts, sweaters, or hoodies that FULLY COVER BOTH ARMS down to the wrists. NEVER bare arms, NEVER short sleeves, NEVER t-shirts, NEVER tank tops, NEVER exposed forearms. Their arms are always covered by uniform solid-color long sleeves with thick black outline only — no patterns, no decorations, no ink, no skin showing on the arms.
global_style_card: STYLE (LOCKED, IDENTICAL IN EVERY SCENE): Whiteboard animation style / Corporate Memphis vector cartoon / Flat colors, thick outlines, minimal shading. Pure 2D cel-shading or vector illustration style — NO 3D render, NO photorealism, NO anime, NO manga screentones. Outlines: uniform, bold black or dark blue, prominent everywhere. Colors: clean, bright corporate color palette with flat fills. Mostly white backgrounds or very simple solid-color backdrops to make characters pop. No smooth gradients. Lighting: flat, even lighting. No dramatic shadows or cinematic lighting. Atmosphere: educational, professional, clean, slightly humorous or direct in a corporate way. Architecture and environment: extremely simplified, often just iconic props (a chart, a whiteboard, a desk, a hospital bed, a giant coin) floating on a clean background.
